name: ADAPT
description: Design T cell receptors (TCRs) for specific peptide-MHC targets. Uses AlphaFold docking and ProteinMPNN for TCR sequence design. Iteratively designs CDR loops to bind target pMHC complexes. Outputs designed TCR sequences with quality metrics including pAE scores and dock-RMSD.
capabilities: Design T cell receptors (TCRs) for specific peptide-MHC targets
Uses AlphaFold docking and ProteinMPNN for TCR sequence design
Iteratively designs CDR loops to bind target pMHC complexes
Outputs designed TCR sequences with quality metrics including pAE scores and dock-RMSD

peptideSequence.description: Peptide sequence of the target peptide-MHC complex

mhcSequence.description: MHC protein amino acid sequence for the target complex

tcrAlphaSequence.description: Optional TCR alpha chain sequence to use as starting template for design

tcrBetaSequence.description: Optional TCR beta chain sequence to use as starting template for design

numDesigns.description: Number of TCR designs to generate
